mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ckmd_stock WHERE shop=#{shopName} and depository=#{depositoryName}
SELECT * FROM ckmd_stock ORDER BY quantity DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT s1.shop AS shopName, s1.sale_number AS saleNumber, IFNULL(s2.stock_quantity, 0) AS StockNumber, IFNULL(p.pq, 0) AS PurchaseNumber FROM ( SELECT shop, SUM(num) AS sale_number FROM jxmd_sale GROUP BY shop ) AS s1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT shop, SUM(quantity) AS stock_quantity FROM ckmd_stock GROUP BY shop ) AS s2 ON s1.shop = s2.shop LEFT JOIN ( SELECT shop, SUM(quantity) AS pq FROM jxmd_purchase GROUP BY shop ) AS p ON s1.shop = p.shop LIMIT 0,5
SELECT shop AS shop, IFNULL(SUM(num), 0) AS saleTotal FROM jxmd_sale WHERE time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY shop
SELECT id AS stockId, shop AS shop, shop_type AS shopType, depository AS depository, quantity AS quantity, IFNULL(safety_stock, 10) AS safeStock, expire_date AS expireDate FROM ckmd_stock
